title: Allow board owners to delete/edit updates of others
excerpt:
Today, only account admins can edit/delete the updates of others. 
Board owners should have this ability. Having to have an admin user delete inappropriate updates is a pain, for example, or to correct bad information in…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Today, only account admins can edit/delete the updates of others.

Board owners should have this ability. Having to have an admin user delete inappropriate updates is a pain, for example, or to correct bad information in an update.

posts.author: daniel.millward (Daniel Millward)
posts.cookedHtml: We would also like to request this as an option or atleast add it to the perimission list. It is very restrictive to not be able to edit or create updates

posts.author: anatetelbom (Ana Tetelbom)
posts.cookedHtml:
Definitely an important feature!!!
When I created an automation to send an email to all board subscribers, aside from sending the email, Monday automatically creates updates owned by “user” Automation and no one can delete it, I have to ask IT to delete manually numerous updates.
Please bring this quick!
